title: Courrier relatif aux contributions à l'OIE

d

MINISTER OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS

"KNOWSLEY"

QUEEN'S PARK WRST

PORT-OP-SPAIN

...

May..!?

........1990

POL:3/8/27/1 Vol. III

The Right Honourable Hubert Vedrine

Minister of Foreign Affairs

Direction Générales de Affaires Politiques et de Sécurité

Direction des Nations Unies et des Organisations Internationales 37, quai d'Orsay 75351 Paris

FRANCE

Sir,

I have the honour to advise you that the Republic of Trinidad and Tobago has decided to become a member of the International Organisation of Epizootics (OIE).

The Government of the Republic of Trinidad and Tobago has examined the provisions of the International Agreement and of the Internal Statutes of 25 January 1994 and agrees to participate in the working costs of the Office under the conditions stated, especially with regard to Article 3 of the International Agreement and Article 11 of the Internal Statutes. The Sixth contribution category has been selected by my government.

The Official Delegate of the Republic of Trinidad and Tobago to the OIE will be Dr.

Winston Harper, Chief Veterinary Officer (a.i.), who is the Director, Animal Production and

Health, Ministry of Agriculture, Land and Marine Resources.

oseph i heodore

c.c. Director General OIE

EMBASSY OF THE

REPUBLIC OF TRINIDAD AND TOBAGO

Telephone : 762.94.00

762.94.15

Telefax :

772.27.83

Ave de la Faisanderie 14

B - 1150 Brussels

Belgium

Note No.54

MINISTERS DES AARLO ATRANCERIS

MATIONS UNLES

18. MAI 1998

ET ORGANISAIIONS INTERNATURALES

12 May 1998

The Embassy of the Republic of Trinidad and Tobago presents its compliments to the Ministry of Foreign Affairs and has the honour to enclose a letter from the Honourable Joseph Theodore,

Acting Minister of Foreign Affairs of Trinidad and Tobago to the

Right Honourable Hubert Vedrine, Minister of Foreign Affairs of the French Republic of May 7, 1998 regarding the decision by the

Government of the Republic of Trinidad and Tobago to become a member of the International Organization of Epizootics (OIE).

The Embassy has the further honour to kindly advise that it would be most grateful if the contents of the letter could be made known to the Right Honourable Minister of Foreign Affairs as soon as possible having regard to the desire of the Government of Trinidad and Tobago to participate in the Sixty-Sixth Session

Of the OIE scheduled for May 25-29, 1998.

The Embassy of the Republic of Trinidad and Tobago avails itself of this opportunity to renew to the Ministry of Foreign

Affairs

the assurances of its highest consideration.

TRINIDAD

AND

Brussels

EMBASS

10 10

".

Ministère des affaires étrangères

NUOI/E/ 528

Le Ministère des Affaires Etrangères présente ses compliments à l'Ambassade de la

Republique de Trinité et Tobago et a l'honneur de se référer à sa note verbale n° 54 du 12 mai 1998 relative à l'adhésion de la République de Trinité et Tobago à l'Arrangement

International instituant l'Office international des épizooties signé à Paris le 25 janvier 1924

Le Ministère a l'honneur de faire savoir à l'Ambassade qu'il a pris bonne note de cette adhésion qui est en cours de communication aux Etats membres de l'Office international des épizooties./.

Le Ministère des Affaires Etrangères saisit cette occasion pour renouveler à l'Ambassade de la République de Trinité et Tobago les assurances de sa haute considération.

26 MAI 1998

AMBASSADE DE LA REPUBLIQUE DE TRINITE ET TOBAGO

14 Avenue de la Faisanderie

B-1150 Bruxelles

BELGIQUE
